zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lord of Haslington Vernon於1418年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭爾哈斯林頓時，他的父親Lord Richard Vernon36歲，母親Jane Tarbock27歲。他於1440年與Mabel Gifford在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1458年11月4日在他的家鄉享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Lord of Haslington Vernon于1418年1月1日出生在英国英格兰爾哈斯林頓时，他的父亲Lord Richard Vernon36岁，母亲Jane Tarbock27岁。他于1440年与Mabel Gifford在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1458年11月4日在他的家乡享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Haslington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Heslington (ER Yorks) or Haslingden (Lancs).

en.lifeSummary: When John Lord of Haslington Vernon was born on 1 January 1418, in Haslington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Richard Vernon, was 36 and his mother, Jane Tarbock, was 27. He married Mabel Gifford in 1440, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 4 November 1458, in his hometown, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lord of Haslington Vernon est né le 1 janvier 1418, à Haslington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Richard Vernon, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Jane Tarbock, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mabel Gifford en 1440, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 novembre 1458, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Lord of Haslington Vernon am 1. Januar 1418 in Haslington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Richard Vernon 36 und seine Mutter Jane Tarbock 27. Er hat 1440 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Mabel Gifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 4. November 1458 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Lord of Haslington Vernon è nato il il 1 gennaio 1418 nel Haslington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Richard Vernon, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Jane Tarbock, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mabel Gifford nel 1440, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 novembre 1458, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Lord of Haslington Vernonが1418年1月1日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハスリントンで生まれた時，父Lord Richard Vernonは36歳，母Jane Tarbockは27歳であった。1440年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでMabel Giffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1458年11月4日に故郷で40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lord of Haslington Vernon(이)가 1418년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 하슬링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Richard Vernon(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Tarbock(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Mabel Gifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 11월 4일 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 January 1418–4 November 1458: 1 de janeiro de 1418–4 de novembro de 1458
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Lord of Haslington Vernon nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1418, em Haslington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Richard Vernon, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Jane Tarbock, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabel Gifford em 1440, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de novembro de 1458, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lord of Haslington Vernon родился 1 января 1418 г. в местности хаслингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Richard Vernon было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Tarbock, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel Gifford в 1440 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 4 ноября 1458 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет.

es.1 January 1418–4 November 1458: 1 de enero de 1418–4 de noviembre de 1458
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Lord of Haslington Vernon nació el 1 de enero de 1418, en Haslington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Richard Vernon, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Jane Tarbock, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Mabel Gifford en 1440, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de noviembre de 1458, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años.
